name: macro
description: A macro plugin for Chili3D that allows users to create, edit and run macros

scripts.preview: npm run build && echo 'Debug URL: http://localhost:8080?plugin=http://localhost:8686' && npx servitsy -p 8686 --cors
scripts.package: npm run build && node ../scripts/package-plugin.mjs dist/macro.chiliplugin manifest.json icons dist

author: Chili3D Team
